Soil/Rock Description: Rounded and subrounded COBBLES, fine to coarse GRAVEL and SAND. Medium dense. 3:30-17:00m: washed boring
Rounded and subrounded COBBLES and fine to coarse GRAVEL. No recovery of finer material washed out. 17.50-24.98m: wash boring

Moderately strong to moderately weak, brown to grey mottled black and yellow, moderately to highly decomposed medium grained GRANITE with closely spaced, narrow to very narrow, rough and manganese stained joints, dipping 15° to 35°.
Strong, pinkish grey, spotted black and white, slightly decomposed medium grained GRANITE with closely spaced to very closely spaced, very narrow, rough undulating, clean joints, dipping 15° to 15°.
